allow: PowerShell($file = 'c:\\Users\\hp\\Desktop\\Studiova-1.0.0\\html\\index.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($file\); if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { 'UTF8-BOM' } else { 'No BOM' }; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file\); if \($text -match "`r`n"\) { 'CRLF' } else { 'LF' })
